name: Tomato Verde Con Questo (Green Tomatoes with Cheese)
recipeIngredient: 1 10 oz can Mexican green tomatoes, drained
1 cup Green chilies, chopped and peeled
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a skillet.
2. Add the onions and garlic, and sauté until the onion is tender.
3. Add the tomatoes, chilies, coriander, and season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Simmer very gently for 10 minutes, uncovered.
5. Add the cheese; when it begins to melt, add the cream.
6. Cook just long enough to heat through.
